g.title: public.categories:parent_id->public.categories:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: public.products:category_id->public.categories:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.orders:user_id->public.users:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.order_items:product_id->public.products:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.order_items:order_id->public.orders:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.payments:order_id->public.orders:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

g.title: public.inventory_stocks:product_id->public.products:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

g.title: public.inventory_movements:product_id->public.products:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
